replies.msg:
有心又識日文可以試吓paiza
我玩到rank A已經收到幾間嘢scout

My friend Celine is an account manager at the Hilton. If she takes the job at Big 4, she'll be three thousand eight hundred dollars a month better off but she's still better off now than she was two years ago when she was working below everyone else in the department. She thinks a junior accountant position is beneath her. If she hadn't taken the CPA exam two years earlier, she won't be working as a manager now. If she had pursued a career in sales rather than accounting, her salary would be much lower. If it wasn't for her uncle's referral to Hilton, her career wouldn't take off now and she wouldn't start earning a lot of money. She's a science fiction fan. She said "If starships really would exist, I would quit my job and spend the rest of my life roaming the universe." Recently, her sister married her childhood sweetheart. Her mum felt she was marrying beneath her though. Her auntie also feels her husband is beneath her. She enjoys socializing with the better off. Her younger brother Joe has been having a crush on this girl named Shirley for eight years but Shirley has a boyfriend. His friend said "I don't blame you. She's quite attractive." But he's beginning to realize he has no place in her scheme of things. He's just being a doormat so I told him to forget her. She's just not worth it. His uncle said "You would be better off without her." His father too said "You'll be better off without her." Celine is a computer expert. Her cousin has to write a report which is due on tuesday but he's having problems with his computer. If Celine will go and fix his computer, he'll be so thankful for her help. He also has exams next monday so he's better off revising at home over the weekend. Last month, Celine was away on a business trip to Hokkaido. After her trip, I said "If you should travel there again, can you get me a pack of White Lover Cookies please?" She loves kickboxing. Her favorite fighter Dan has won his retirement fight lately. He's eternally grateful to his coaches and thankful that he's got a job as a color commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans wanna see Randy versus Fred. If Fred would sign a deal with the organization, Dana will make the fight happen. When Randy was reading the terms and conditions of the contract, Dana's assistant said "If you would just sign here please." Celine's elder brother is a concierge in a hotel. I said "If it'll make you happy, I'll come to stay for a couple nights as company for you while your colleagues are away."
